subcodes.first_line: O Herald, O servant with ears attuned to the celestial call! Though He remaineth hidden, yet behold His steed prancing in the field [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سروش ای بنده حلقه بگوش سروش اگرچه پنهانست ولی سمندش در جولان ملاحظه کن
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
